tools.name: bundles.describeBundle
tools.description: Get the bundle details for the requested bundle id.

tools.name: bundles.exportBundle
tools.description: Generates customized software development kit (SDK) and or tool packages used to integrate mobile web or mobile app clients with backend AWS resources.

tools.name: exports.exportProject
tools.description: Exports project configuration to a snapshot which can be downloaded and shared. Note that mobile app push credentials are encrypted in exported projects, so they can only be shared successfully within the same AWS account.

tools.name: projectProjectId.describeProject
tools.description: Gets details about a project in AWS Mobile Hub.

tools.name: projects.createProject
tools.description: Creates an AWS Mobile Hub project.

tools.name: projects.deleteProject
tools.description: Delets a project in AWS Mobile Hub.

tools.name: projects.listProjects
tools.description: Lists projects in AWS Mobile Hub.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
